title: Time Signature
story: [Meridian-7 Log #011] rEx has sent a set of timestamps in HH:MM format (24-hour). What do these time points mean? Perhaps they mark rEx's civilization's daily cycle, or perhaps a designated communication window. First extract all valid times — accurate reading is the prerequisite for understanding meaning.
promptChallenge: Write a prompt to have AI generate a regex that matches 24-hour format times (HH:MM, e.g., 09:30, 23:59)
hints: [Hint] You need to constrain hours and minutes separately
promptHints: Tell the AI the exact time format and valid ranges
Clarify the numeric constraints for hours and minutes
Note that 24:00 and 12:60 are both invalid

feedback.onPass: [Pattern Accepted] Time synchronized. The signal now has a timeline.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Time format error. Your constraints don't cover all boundaries.
feedback.onPerfect: [Decryption Success] Perfect synchronization. Every timestamp is precise to the minute.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual time calibration. Time is no problem for you.
